task_completion.description: Verify a new template is being created for the 'Bug' work item type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azure DevOps interface should show a template creation or edit screen specifically indicating the work item type is 'Bug'.

task_completion.description: Verify the template name and pre-filled Title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The template name field should be set to 'Frontend Bug Report' and the work item Title field should be pre-filled with '[Frontend] <short description>'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Priority and Severity fields are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Priority field should be set to '2' and the Severity field should be set to '2 - High'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Area Path and Tags are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Area Path field should display 'TailwindTraders' and the Tags field should include both 'frontend' and 'needs-triage'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Repro Steps or Description field contains the required markdown headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Repro Steps or Description text area must contain the markdown headers. Look specifically for '**Steps to Reproduce:**' and '**Expected Result:**' at a minimum.

task_completion.description: Verify the template has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved' confirmation message, the template appearing in the project's list of saved templates, or the 'Save' button being clicked/showing a saved state.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a web browser to interact with Azure DevOps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Edge, Firefox) navigating the Azure DevOps portal.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the genuine Azure DevOps application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI must be the actual Azure DevOps interface for project settings and work item templates, not a local text document, mocked HTML page, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI using terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The fields should be populated within the web UI forms. There should be no evidence of the agent using a terminal to run curl commands or PowerShell scripts to create the template via API.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Template Name: 'Frontend Bug Report'. Work Item Type: Bug. Expected Fields: Priority=2, Severity='2 - High', Area Path='TailwindTraders', Tags=['frontend', 'needs-triage']. Critical Note: While the task description asks for four specific markdown headers in the description, the backend verifier only strictly requires 'Steps to Reproduce' and 'Expected Result'. Please award full points for the description/repro steps if at least these two headers are present.
